news.t: Three Weeks, Seven ETFs: Horizon Completes Wave of New Fund Launches with Two More Actively Managed Funds

holdings.infoBox: QGRD is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Horizon Nasdaq-100 Defined Risk ETF (QGRD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation and preservation through investments in NASDAQ 100 FLEX options. The funds options-based strategy is intended to generate income, manage volatility, and reduce downside risk. QGRD was launched on Jul 9, 2025 and is issued by Horizon.

data.title: Three Weeks, Seven ETFs: Horizon Completes Wave of New Fund Launches with Two More Actively Managed Funds
data.text: CHARLOTTE, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Horizon launches Nasdaq 100 Defined Risk ETF and Digital Frontier ETF, providing advisors with more ways to put firm's goals-based approaches to work.
